# `economy/state_gdp_current_inr_lakh_crore`

**Title**: State GDP (current prices)  
**One-line**: Gross Domestic Product of the state at current (nominal) prices, in Lakh Crore Rupees.  
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-15T20:53:11Z (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/economy/state_gdp_current_inr_lakh_crore.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/economy/state_gdp_current_inr_lakh_crore.json)

## Definition

Gross Domestic Product of the state at current (nominal) prices, in Lakh Crore Rupees. The 'sticker' value of all goods and services produced in the state — useful for tax-base sizing, but inflation-distorted across years.

## Signature

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Entity kind | `state` |
| Time grain | `fiscal_year` |
| Value kind | `currency` |
| Unit | `INR (lakh crore)` |
| Direction | `higher_is_better` |
| Comparability | `comparable_with_normalisation` |
| Attribution geography | `where_administered` |
| Implementing authority | `state` |
| Scale hint | `linear` |

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2011-04..2024-04 (14 periods)
- **Spatial**: All-India aggregate; 28 states; 6 UTs (35 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 466

## Methodology vintage

NITI Aayog ICED state-wise deep-dive (GSDP Trends panel); merged snapshot 2026-05-14; 14 fiscal years, 466 rows. Historical FY 2011-12 .. 2014-15 added 2026-05-14 from State_GDP_Trends export; overlap values refreshed to ICED's 11-decimal precision (prior values were rounded to 2dp).

## Notes

Source: NITI Aayog ICED dashboard, row 'GDP (Base: 2011-12) Current Price'. Same unit-annotation caveat as the constant-price indicator: values are in **Lakh Crore**.
